title: Sound Sprouts
description: A gentle phonics word-builder: tap big sound tiles, hear each sound, blend them into a word, and reveal a picture. 133 illustrated CVC words across three no-pressure modes.
learningGoals: Recognize onset and rime sounds in single-syllable words
Blend two sound chunks into a spoken CVC word
Connect written letters to the sounds they make
Map a decoded word to its meaning through a matching picture
Build phonemic confidence through low-stakes, self-paced play
interactionModel: tap letter tiles to build words

modes.title: Mystery Picture
modes.skill: decode a word to reveal a picture

credits: Kaigani; art + voice generated locally (see ASSETS.md)
